# GEM-pRF — Landing / Quickstart

Source URL: https://gemprf.github.io/index.html

## GEM-pRF

GPU-Empowered Mapping. Highly Accurate Retinotopic Maps.

## Quickstart

Welcome to **GEM-pRF** — a standalone, plug-and-play software for population receptive field (pRF) mapping, designed for large-scale data analysis with high accuracy.

To understand the theoretical foundations and details of how the software works, please refer to the paper:

[Mittal et al. (2025), GEM-pRF: GPU-Empowered Mapping of Population Receptive Fields for Large-Scale fMRI Analysis](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.media.2025.103891)

Follow these steps to quickly get up and running with GEM-pRF:

- Begin with the [Installation Guide](installation.html) to set up your environment.
- Proceed to [Running GEM-pRF](running.html) for instructions on executing the software.
